title: Amara Raja Batteries Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Amara Raja Batteries Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Amara Raja Batteries Global Group has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amara Raja Batteries Global Group:
Amara Raja Batteries Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amara Raja Batteries Global Group!
